content: I am ready to assist you with your research needs. Please provide me with a specific topic or objective.
Make a detailed report on the Iran War

[TOOL: update_plan({"tool_input": "Create a detailed report on the Iran War | Delegate historical research to Military Historian, Delegate geopolitical research to Geopolitics Researcher, Synthesize findings into a report"})]
